WHERE c.GovernmentForm = 'Republic'

question: What is the language spoken by the largest percentage of people in each country?

reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_contract:
SELECT c.Name AS Country, cl.Language, MAX(cl.Percentage) AS LargestPercentage
FROM country c
JOIN countrylanguage cl ON c.Code = cl.CountryCode
GROUP BY c.Name;
reasoner_decision.candidate_sql_oneshot:
SELECT c.Name AS Country, cl.Language, cl.Percentage
FROM country c
JOIN countrylanguage cl ON c.Code = cl.CountryCode
WHERE (c.Code, cl.Percentage) IN (
    SELECT CountryCode, MAX(Percentage)
    FROM countrylanguage
    GROUP BY CountryCode
);

final_sql:
SELECT c.Name AS Country, cl.Language, cl.Percentage
FROM country c
JOIN countrylanguage cl ON c.Code = cl.CountryCode
WHERE (c.Code, cl.Percentage) IN (
    SELECT CountryCode, MAX(Percentage)
    FROM countrylanguage
    GROUP BY CountryCode
);
